text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the autumn Tenno Sho—the
ultimate medium-distance race for classic and
senior-year racers.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: I'm telling you, Tamamo Cross is gonna win today! She's gonna pull off the first Tenno Sweep of all time! Hoooo boy, do I wanna see history made with my very own eyes!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Nah, it's definitely Oguri Cap's day! This is the
Beast of Kasamatsu we're talking about here! Not
even Tamamo Cross stands a chance!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
The heck? Race hasn't even started yet and the
air's already cracklin'.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
With this much pressure built up, Tokyo
Racecourse is gonna blow like a cork when I win.
Now that'd be a sight.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
No, that'd be problematic. We wouldn't be able
to race.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
No, ya dummy, that was just a figure of speech!
Quit lookin' like da sky's started fallin'!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I don't want anything to happen to the
racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! C'mon, you were rarin' to go already
without all this metaphor nonsense!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hit me with yer best shot, Oguri Cap. Da White
Lightnin' of Naniwa's gonna put ya in yer place.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(...The atmosphere is suffocating. This pressure
must be down to the presence of the other
racers—they're the mightiest of the moment...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(The race has yet to begin and I can barely
contain my excitement. I want to get a taste of
their prowess as soon as I possibly can!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
A gathering of the moment's greatest on the
ultimate stage... Here I come.
